description: Apple-style documentation improvement with progressive disclosure

dispatches.task: Audit all documentation for accuracy, completeness, and consistency. Flag gaps, errors, and outdated content. Produce /tmp/doc-audit-report.md

Create Apple-style quick start guide with progressive disclosure at docs/quick-start.md. Focus on 5-minute success path with clear outcomes. Include: What You'll Build, Before You Begin, Step 1-5 with clear examples and expected outputs. End with What's Next links.

Create concept definitions in docs/concepts/ for: agents.md, squads.md, playbooks.md, combos.md, memory.md. Each should include: definition, when to use, quick example, available options, and create-your-own section.
Transform docs/index.md into Apple-style landing page. Lead with outcomes not features. Use benefit-driven headlines. Add clear hero section explaining what Euxis does in one sentence.
Create comprehensive CLI reference at docs/reference/cli-reference.md. Document all 30+ tools with: synopsis, description, options, examples, and see also sections. Follow man page style.
Create troubleshooting guide at docs/guides/troubleshooting.md. Document common issues with problem/solution pairs. Include real scenarios from validation errors.
